qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: IP spoofing via trusted proxy headers bypasses brute-force login protection
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: Different vulnerable code and root cause: this finding concerns trusted client-IP headers in get_client_ip()/Auth::isBrute(), while the advisory concerns SQL concatenation in the componenti branch of modules/impianti/ajax/select.php.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: SQL injection in Scadenzario module delete operation via unsanitized id_record parameter
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: Same broad vulnerability class but different vulnerable code and source-to-sink path: this finding targets modules/scadenzario/actions.php id_record in a DELETE query, while the advisory targets options[matricola] in the componenti IN() clause in modules/impianti/ajax/select.php.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: CORS wildcard in API allows any origin to access authenticated API endpoints
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: Different vulnerable component and mechanism: this finding concerns Access-Control-Allow-Origin: * in api/index.php, while the advisory concerns SQL injection in the componenti AJAX selector.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: CSRF protection disabled by default allows cross-site request forgery on all state-changing operations
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: Different vulnerable component and mechanism: this finding concerns disabled CSRF protection in configuration/global initialization, while the advisory concerns SQL injection in modules/impianti/ajax/select.php.

target_advisory_judgement.reason: No final qualifying finding identifies the advisory-described vulnerable code/root cause: authenticated SQL injection through options[matricola] in the componenti operation of modules/impianti/ajax/select.php. The only SQL injection finding is a separate Scadenzario id_record DELETE-query injection.
evidence: Advisory GHSA-qjv8-63xq-gq8m describes modules/impianti/ajax/select.php lines 122-124, case 'componenti', where options[matricola] is concatenated into `my_componenti`.`id_impianto` IN (...).
sql_injection_scadenzario/vulnerability_report.json describes modules/scadenzario/actions.php:163 and an id_record parameter concatenated into DELETE FROM co_scadenziario WHERE id='...'.

The other qualifying findings concern CSRF defaults, wildcard CORS headers, and spoofable client-IP headers for brute-force protection, none of which are the advisory SQL injection source-to-sink path.
blockers_to_higher_tier: No advisory-matched qualifying finding exists, so Tier1/Tier2/Tier3 classification and PoC execution are not applicable.
